title: gymnadenia odoratissima subsp. suaveolens
intro: Gymnadenia odoratissima subsp. suaveolens, also known as the Fragrant Orchid, is a type of orchid native to the mountainous regions of Europe. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties, making it useful in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The health benefits of Gymnadenia odoratissima subsp. suaveolens include its ability to alleviate symptoms of colds, flu, and other respiratory infections, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and promote relaxation. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made by drying the flowers and leaves, which can then be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures.
